name: Moon Golf- Melbourne
about: Moon Golf is a premier golf retail and fitting center that integrates high-performance Trackman simulators directly into its sales and club fitting process. The venue offers a comprehensive golf experience, featuring professional club fittings, club repair services, and the latest equipment from top brands. With a focus on data-driven fitting and technology, it serves golfers looking for serious practice equipment and expert advice. The center also carries a wide range of apparel, accessories, and offers services like custom shaft fitting and ball selection based on player needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional club fitting with data analysis using Trackman technology
Ability to try before you buy on simulators before purchasing clubs
State-of-the-art dual radar Trackman simulators for accurate ball and club tracking

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar Technology with one radar tracking club data and the other tracking ball flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Moon Golf provides clubs for fitting and simulator use, but you can also bring your own to test on their Trackman simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink service, so outside food and drinks are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but their simulators are designed for both fitting and full course play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities or services, so it may not be ideal for children.
